name: Polio / Inactivated Poliovirus (IPV) Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for inactivated poliovirus (IPV) vaccines including monovalent and combination formulations. Used in childhood immunization status (CIS) measure. Requires 3 doses by age 2 (at 2, 4, and 6-18 months).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Trivalent poliovirus vaccine, live, oral (OPV — historical)
Poliovirus vaccine, inactivated (IPV), for subcutaneous or intramuscular use
DTaP-IPV vaccine (Kinrix, Quadracel), for intramuscular use
